kubejs.ponder.tag.tips.description: Tips about ranching that aren't entirely about the slimes!
kubejs.ponder.fel_pumpkin_blaze.text_1: Placing a Fel Pumpkin atop 2 iron bars...
kubejs.ponder.fel_pumpkin_blaze.text_2: Spawns a blaze! This blaze will only drop blaze powder.
kubejs.ponder.fel_pumpkin_blaze.text_3: Though it can still be placed inside a blaze burner.
